item.title: This Indoor Mini Golf Course Surprised Us
item.description: An indoor mini golf course delivers unexpected challenges, creative designs, and memorable moments during a fun round of competition.

media:content.media:title: This Indoor Mini Golf Course Surprised Us
media:content.media:description: An indoor mini golf course delivers unexpected challenges, creative designs, and memorable moments during a fun round of competition.

item.title: A Mini Golf Course Like No Other
item.description: A unique mini golf course features creative obstacles, challenging layouts, and unexpected twists that make every hole a new experience.

media:content.media:title: A Mini Golf Course Like No Other
media:content.media:description: A unique mini golf course features creative obstacles, challenging layouts, and unexpected twists that make every hole a new experience.

item.title: Mini Golf Challenge at Hole 10
item.description: The competition continues at Hole 10 as players take on tricky obstacles, creative shots, and friendly mini golf rivalry.

media:content.media:title: Mini Golf Challenge at Hole 10
media:content.media:description: The competition continues at Hole 10 as players take on tricky obstacles, creative shots, and friendly mini golf rivalry.

item.title: Mini Golf Mystery Paths to a Hole-in-One
item.description: A mini golf course features unique mystery paths that create exciting shortcuts, unexpected outcomes, and potential hole-in-one opportunities.

media:content.media:title: Mini Golf Mystery Paths to a Hole-in-One
media:content.media:description: A mini golf course features unique mystery paths that create exciting shortcuts, unexpected outcomes, and potential hole-in-one opportunities.

item.title: Mini Golf Challenge at Hole 4
item.description: A competitive mini golf match continues at Hole 4, featuring creative shots, friendly competition, and challenges on a unique course.

media:content.media:title: Mini Golf Challenge at Hole 4
media:content.media:description: A competitive mini golf match continues at Hole 4, featuring creative shots, friendly competition, and challenges on a unique course.

item.title: Congo River Mini Golf Match Twist
item.description: A mini golf match takes an unexpected turn on a Congo River-themed course, featuring challenging shots, surprises, and friendly competition.

media:content.media:title: Congo River Mini Golf Match Twist
media:content.media:description: A mini golf match takes an unexpected turn on a Congo River-themed course, featuring challenging shots, surprises, and friendly competition.

item.title: The World's Longest Mini Golf Hole! - Must Play Course!
item.description: A look at an unusually long mini golf hole, featuring creative course design, strategic play, and a unique challenge for players.

media:content.media:title: The World's Longest Mini Golf Hole! - Must Play Course!
media:content.media:description: A look at an unusually long mini golf hole, featuring creative course design, strategic play, and a unique challenge for players.

item.title: The Lost Caverns Mega Mini Golf Tournament! - Holes 34-36
item.description: The tournament reaches holes 34–36, featuring creative cave-themed obstacles, strategic shots, and the final moments of the mini golf challenge.

media:content.media:description: The tournament reaches holes 34–36, featuring creative cave-themed obstacles, strategic shots, and the final moments of the mini golf challenge.

item.description: The tournament moves through holes 31–33, featuring cave-inspired obstacles, strategic shots, and friendly competition on the mini golf course.

item.title: Is This the Hardest Mini Golf Hole Ever?!
item.description: A closer look at a particularly difficult mini golf hole, featuring unique obstacles, careful strategy, and the challenge of making the perfect shot.
